name: My arm got crushed by a press at my factory job, do I qualify for workers comp?
description: Yes, machinery injuries at work during job duties qualify for workers' comp benefits.

mainEntity.name: My arm got crushed by a press at my factory job, do I qualify for workers comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, machinery injuries at work during job duties qualify for workers' comp benefits.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if the injury happened during your job duties on company time and property.** Workers' compensation covers machinery accidents arising out of employment, even with usual exertions[1][4]. Pre-existing conditions don't disqualify if work aggravated them. The accident must be unexpected, like a malfunction. Report promptly and file a claim. Get legal help to prove causation.
